lagrangeIdentityStatus.label: symbolic Lagrange identity
lagrangeIdentityStatus.reason: Expanding D_s B_P telescopes the product-rule terms and leaves h P f - f P^*h.  No quadrature, sampling, or Galerkin limit is used.

formalProof: The derivative landing on D^j f cancels the derivative landing on the previous j+1 summand.
Only the boundary terms j=k-1 and j=0 remain, giving a_k h D^k f and -(-1)^k D^k(a_k h)f.
